en: Give thanks to the LORD, for he is good, for his steadfast love endures forever.
zh: 你們要稱謝耶和華，因他本是良善的， 他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: Give thanks to the God of gods, for his steadfast love endures forever.
zh: 你們要稱謝萬神之神， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: Give thanks to the Lord of lords, for his steadfast love endures forever;
zh: 你們要稱謝萬主之主， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: to him who alone does great wonders, for his steadfast love endures forever;
zh: 要稱謝那獨行大奇事的， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: to him who by understanding made the heavens, for his steadfast love endures forever;
zh: 要稱謝那用智慧造成諸天的， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: to him who spread out the earth above the waters, for his steadfast love endures forever;
zh: 要稱謝那鋪張大地在水上的， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: to him who made the great lights, for his steadfast love endures forever;
zh: 要稱謝那造成大光的， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: the sun to rule over the day, for his steadfast love endures forever;
zh: 他造太陽管白晝， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: the moon and stars to rule over the night, for his steadfast love endures forever;
zh: 他造月亮和星星管黑夜， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: to him who struck down the firstborn of Egypt, for his steadfast love endures forever;
zh: 要稱謝那擊殺埃及所有頭生的， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: and brought Israel out from among them, for his steadfast love endures forever;
zh: 他領以色列人從他們中間出來， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: with a strong hand and an outstretched arm, for his steadfast love endures forever;
zh: 他用大能的手和伸出來的膀臂領他們出來， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: to him who divided the Red Sea in two, for his steadfast love endures forever;
zh: 要稱謝那分開紅海的， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: and made Israel pass through the midst of it, for his steadfast love endures forever;
zh: 他領以色列人從海中經過， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: but overthrew Pharaoh and his host in the Red Sea, for his steadfast love endures forever;
zh: 他把法老和他的軍兵都抖落在紅海裡， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: to him who led his people through the wilderness, for his steadfast love endures forever;
zh: 要稱謝那引導自己的子民走過曠野的， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: to him who struck down great kings, for his steadfast love endures forever;
zh: 要稱謝那擊殺大君王的， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: and killed mighty kings, for his steadfast love endures forever;
zh: 他殺戮了強盛的君王， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: Sihon, king of the Amorites, for his steadfast love endures forever;
zh: 他殺了亞摩利王西宏， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: and Og, king of Bashan, for his steadfast love endures forever;
zh: 他殺了巴珊王噩， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: and gave their land as a heritage, for his steadfast love endures forever;
zh: 他把他們的地賜給了自己的子民作產業， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: a heritage to Israel his servant, for his steadfast love endures forever.
zh: 他把他們的地賜給他的僕人以色列作產業， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: It is he who remembered us in our low estate, for his steadfast love endures forever;
zh: 他在我們卑微的時候顧念我們， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: and rescued us from our foes, for his steadfast love endures forever;
zh: 他救我們脫離了敵人， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: he who gives food to all flesh, for his steadfast love endures forever.
zh: 他把糧食賜給全人類， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: Give thanks to the God of heaven, for his steadfast love endures forever.
zh: 你們要稱謝天上的 神， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。
